info.title: ThingSpeak API
info.description: ThingSpeak is an IoT platform that uses channels to store data sent from apps or devices. Use REST API calls to create channels, write and read data, manage TalkBack commands, and more.

get.description: Get information about a specific channel.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Read API Key for private channels

post.description: Update channel feed with new data.

api_key.description: Write API Key for the channel

get.description: Read data from all fields in a channel.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Read API Key (required for private channels)

parameters.name: round
parameters.description: Round to this many decimal places

parameters.name: timescale
parameters.description: Get first value in this many minutes

parameters.name: sum
parameters.description: Get sum of this many minutes

parameters.name: average
parameters.description: Get average of this many minutes

parameters.name: median
parameters.description: Get median of this many minutes

delete.description: Delete all feed data from a channel.

get.description: Read data from a single field of a channel.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Read API Key (required for private channels)

parameters.name: round
parameters.description: Round to this many decimal places

parameters.name: timescale
parameters.description: Get first value in this many minutes

parameters.name: sum
parameters.description: Get sum of this many minutes

parameters.name: average
parameters.description: Get average of this many minutes

parameters.name: median
parameters.description: Get median of this many minutes

get.description: Read the last entry in a channel feed.

get.summary: Read last entry in a field
get.description: Read the last entry in a specific field of a channel.
Read the last status update of a channel.
Read status of specific entry in channel.
Get all commands from a TalkBack queue.

post.description: Add a command to a TalkBack queue.

delete.description: Delete all commands in a TalkBack queue.

put.description: Update a command in the TalkBack queue.

post.description: Execute the next TalkBack command in the queue.

get.description: Get the last executed TalkBack command.

WriteApiKey.name: api_key
WriteApiKey.description: Write API Key for the specific channel

ReadApiKey.name: api_key
ReadApiKey.description: Read API Key (for private channels) or User API Key
